competitors.title: Zero In Honeypot Wasp Trap Bait Refill 3 Pack – Super Effective Non-Toxic Wasp Attractant Sachets – Lasts 2-3 Weeks Per Refill – For Use with Honeypot & Ready-Baited Wasp Traps – Outdoor Garden Use
bullets: SUPER EFFECTIVE WASP ATTRACTANT – Highly potent bait formula that wasps find irresistible. Attracts and lures wasps into the trap from a wide radius, ensuring rapid catch rates during peak wasp season.
NON-TOXIC & NON-HAZARDOUS – Safe for use in gardens, patios, bin areas, BBQ zones and outdoor dining spaces. Contains no harmful pesticides or chemicals. Hang traps out of reach of children and pets.

3 REFILL SACHETS – Each pack includes three 4g bait sachets, providing up to 9 weeks of wasp protection. Simply empty sachet contents into the wasp trap, add water and hang in a sunny, sheltered spot.
COMPATIBLE TRAPS – Suitable for refilling the Zero In Honeypot Ready-Baited Wasp Trap and Zero In Ready-Baited Wasp Trap. Keep traps active all summer long with fresh bait for continued protection.

EASY TO USE – Mix one sachet with water and add to trap. Allow approximately 24 hours for bait activation. Top up with water regularly and replace bait when the trap is full. Dispose of contents by burying in garden or placing in household waste.

competitors.title: Entopest 2 x Wasp Nest Killer Trap and Bait Attractant Kit | Wasp Trap, Hornet Trap, Bee Catcher, Wasp Traps Outdoor/Indoor, Hornet Nest Killer, Wasp Catchers for The Garden
bullets: Entopest - Superior Wasp Control: Designed to effectively lure and trap wasps, our kit uses a proven attractant formula that draws wasps away from occupied areas and into the traps. Enjoy a wasp-free environment in your garden, patio, or any outdoor space where wasps are a nuisance.

User-Friendly Design: The Entopest Wasp Trap Kit is extremely easy to install. Simply hang the traps around your property's perimeter using the included hanging mechanisms. The design allows for quick checks and easy disposal of trapped wasps without mess or hassle.

Optimized for Outdoor Use: The traps are specifically designed for external environments, making them ideal for use in gardens, along fruit trees, around pools, and other areas where wasps typically congregate. They are discreet and blend easily with outdoor settings.

Professional Grade Efficiency: Trusted by pest control professionals, our wasp trap kits are built to professional standards, ensuring effective and reliable wasp control. This professional-grade quality is now available for your home use, providing you with top-tier pest control.

Comprehensive Coverage: Each kit includes two traps and bait, allowing for strategic placement around your property for maximum coverage and protection. With two traps, you can double the area of protection, ensuring that your entire garden or patio area is safeguarded from pests.

competitors.title: Entopest 250ml Wasp Lure Liquid Trap Bait - Professional Strength Bait Attractant for Hanging Wasp Pots (Garden & Outdoor Use)
bullets: Potent Attractant Formula: Engineered with professional strength, our 250ml Wasp Lure Liquid is designed to effectively attract wasps from a wide area into your traps. This powerful formula enhances the efficiency of any hanging wasp pot, ensuring optimal control of wasp populations.

Easy to Use: Simply add the liquid bait to your existing wasp trap according to the instructions provided. The design of the bottle allows for precise pouring without spills or wastage, making setup quick and hassle-free.

Long-Lasting Attraction: Each 100ml bottle offers multiple refills for wasp traps, ensuring prolonged protection throughout the peak wasp seasons. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your outdoor areas are protected for longer durations.

Boosts Trap Effectiveness: When used with Entopest or other compatible hanging wasp traps, this bait increases the traps' attractiveness to wasps, significantly enhancing capture rates and contributing to a more enjoyable outdoor environment.

Professional Grade Quality: Trusted by pest management professionals, this wasp lure delivers reliable results with a formula that's been tested and proven in a variety of settings, from residential gardens to commercial landscapes.
